name: Blue-Eyes Twin Burst Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青眼の双爆裂龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブルーアイズ・ツイン・バースト・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
"Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by sending the above monsters you control to the GY. Cannot be destroyed by battle. Can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. At the end of the Damage Step, when this card attacks an opponent's monster, but the opponent's monster was not destroyed by the battle: You can banish that opponent's monster.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Advent of the Eyes of Blue

action: Sends Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Graveyard
Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
summoning: Requires only specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires monsters with the same name as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
banished: Banishes battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
